Opportunity Details

Name Of Post :All India Bar Examination AIBE 21th Result 2026
Post Date / Update :18 July 2026 | 05:08 PM
Short InformationAll India Bar Examination AIBE AIBE XXI has released the online application for AIBE XXI 2026 will start from 11 February 2026 and the last date to apply will be 30 April 2026.candidates should read the AIBE XXI 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the AIBE exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, information and other types of information and then apply.
Bar Council of India (BCI) All India Bar Examination AIBE AIBE XXI Examination 2026 AIBE 21th Exam 2026 : Short Details of Notification WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM
Important Dates Application Begin : 11/02/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 30/04/2026 Fee Payment Last Date : 01/05/2026 Correction Last Date : 03/05/2026 AIBE XIX Exam Date : 07/06/2026 Admit Card Available : 22/05/2026 Final Answer Key Available : 10/07/2026 Result Declared : 18/07/2026Application Fee General (UR) / OBC : 3500 /- SC / ST : 2500/- Pay the Examination Fee Through E Challan Offline Mode or Pay the Exam Fee Through Online Debit Card, Credit Card or Net Banking Fee Mode
All India Bar Exam AIBE XXI Notification 2026 : Age Limit Details No Age Limit in All India Bar Exam AIBE AIBE XXI 2026
Bar Council AIBE 21 Exam 2026 : Eligibility Details
Exam NameAIBE Eligibility 2026
All India Bar Examination AIBE XXIBachelor Degree in Law (LLB) in Any Recognized Board in India. General and OBC Candidate : 45% SC / ST / PH : 40% More Eligibility Details Read the Notification
AIBE AIBE XXI Exam 2026: Document Required List Class 10th Matriculation Certificate 10+2 Intermediate/Diploma Certificate Law Degree LLB 3 Years/LLB 5 Years Certificate Passport Size Photograph Signature photograph Enrollment Certificate Category Certificate Disability Certificate All documents have to be uploaded in PDF format whose size should be less than 1 MB.
Interested Candidates Can Read the AIBE 21th Exam 2026  Full Notification Before Apply Online
